## Section 6 — Phase 5 Gate Requirements

Phase 5 will not start automatically. The following must be explicitly provided before Phase 5 can be presented:

1. Explicit owner approval of the Phase 5 approval gate
2. Review of `docs/MGA_PHASE_5_MASTER_GENERAL_AGENT_PAGE_SPEC.md`
3. Confirmation that the `/mga/command` route and associated UI are ready to activate
4. Separate confirmation that P2 help/notification entity scoping has been evaluated

Phase 5 will activate the `MasterGeneralAgentCommandPage` UI, expose MGA-scoped navigation, and enable MGA admin users to access their scoped data through the Phase 3 service layer. **None of this occurs until the Phase 5 gate is explicitly opened.**
